title: solena bowieana
intro: Solena bowieana, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy or prickly caltrop, is a species of flowering plant in the family Capparaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Solena bowieana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its root and seeds are often used in traditional medicine.
